name: FSAutoResearch SDK Conformance Specification
description: This specification defines the API surface, method signatures, and expected behavior that all FSAutoResearch SDK implementations must provide.

methods.name: initialize
methods.description: Initialize the SDK with configuration and fetch flags from the server.

base_url.description: Base URL of the feature flag service

default_flags.description: Default flags to use before server response

behavior.fetches_flags: Must fetch all flags from the server during initialization
behavior.timeout: Must complete within 500ms for flag fetch
behavior.error_handling: Must not throw; errors should be logged or emitted via error event
behavior.offline: Must use default_flags if offline_mode is true

methods.name: destroy
methods.description: Shut down the SDK, close connections, and release resources.

behavior.closes_sse: Must close any active SSE connections
behavior.stops_polling: Must stop any active polling timers
behavior.idempotent: Must be safe to call multiple times

methods.name: is_initialized
methods.description: Check whether the SDK has completed initialization.

methods.name: is_enabled
methods.signature: isEnabled(flagKey: string, defaultValue?: boolean, context?: EvalContext) => boolean

user_key.description: Unique user identifier for targeting and rollout

behavior.unknown_flag: Returns defaultValue for unknown flag keys
behavior.targeting: Respects targeting rules when context is provided
behavior.percentage: Returns deterministic result for same user_key

methods.name: variation_string
methods.signature: variationString(flagKey: string, defaultValue: string, context?: EvalContext) => string

behavior.unknown_flag: Returns defaultValue for unknown flag keys
behavior.type_mismatch: Returns defaultValue if flag is not a string type

methods.name: variation_number
methods.signature: variationNumber(flagKey: string, defaultValue: number, context?: EvalContext) => number

behavior.unknown_flag: Returns defaultValue for unknown flag keys
behavior.type_mismatch: Returns defaultValue if flag is not a number type

methods.name: variation_json
methods.signature: variationJSON(flagKey: string, defaultValue: object, context?: EvalContext) => object
methods.description: Evaluate a JSON feature flag. Returns a parsed object.

behavior.unknown_flag: Returns defaultValue for unknown flag keys
behavior.type_mismatch: Returns defaultValue if flag is not a JSON type
behavior.parse: Must return a parsed object, not a JSON string

methods.name: variation
methods.signature: variation(flagKey: string, defaultValue: any, context?: EvalContext) => any
methods.description: Generic variation method that returns the flag value regardless of type.

methods.name: get_all_flags
methods.description: Return all currently loaded flags as a key-value map.

methods.name: evaluate_bulk
methods.description: Evaluate multiple flags in a single call.

methods.name: track
methods.signature: track(flagKey: string, userKey: string, value: any) => void
methods.description: Record an impression event for analytics.

behavior.async: Should not block the calling thread

events.name: ready
events.description: Emitted when the SDK has finished initialization and flags are available.

events.name: error
events.description: Emitted when an error occurs. Payload contains error details.

events.name: flags_change
events.description: Emitted when flags are updated via SSE or polling.

events.name: impression
events.description: Emitted when a flag is evaluated.

methods.name: resolve_boolean_value
methods.signature: resolveBooleanValue(flagKey: string, defaultValue: boolean, context: EvaluationContext) => ResolutionDetails<boolean>

methods.name: resolve_string_value
methods.signature: resolveStringValue(flagKey: string, defaultValue: string, context: EvaluationContext) => ResolutionDetails<string>

methods.name: resolve_number_value
methods.signature: resolveNumberValue(flagKey: string, defaultValue: number, context: EvaluationContext) => ResolutionDetails<number>

methods.name: resolve_object_value
methods.signature: resolveObjectValue(flagKey: string, defaultValue: object, context: EvaluationContext) => ResolutionDetails<object>

variant.description: The variant key that was selected

flag_format.description: The JSON format for flags as served by the API

get_flags.description: Retrieve all feature flags for the given environment

sse_stream.description: Establish an SSE connection for real-time flag updates
